title: Assistant Store Manager - Malabar Gold & Diamonds - 2025 Hiring Drive

jsonLd.title: Assistant Store Manager - Malabar Gold & Diamonds - 2025 Hiring Drive
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Malabar Gold & Diamonds! We are hiring a Assistant Store Manager for our Ranchi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Malabar Gold & Diamonds:
Malabar Gold & Diamonds is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Customer Service

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Malabar Gold & Diamonds!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
